message:
fix: use exclusive write lock for legacy token migration in GetAll (#3367) (#3380)

migrateLegacyGitHubToken() mutates shared state but was called under
RLock in GetAll(), creating a data race when multiple goroutines call
GetAll() concurrently. Now check under RLock, upgrade to exclusive Lock
for the mutation, persist the migration, then re-acquire RLock for the
rest of GetAll.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
